name: clean cardiac MRI — normal LV function

report.technique: 1.5T cardiac MRI with cine SSFP, T1/T2 mapping, and post-contrast late gadolinium enhancement.
report.findings: Normal LV size and systolic function with LVEF 60%. Normal RV size and function. No regional wall motion abnormality. No late gadolinium enhancement. No pericardial effusion.
report.impression:
1. Normal biventricular size and systolic function (LVEF 60%).
2. No evidence of myocardial fibrosis on late gadolinium enhancement.
